requirement_topic.en: Fire Safety & Thermal Runaway Propagation — BESS (EEA/Norway)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统消防安全与热失控扩散（EEA／挪威）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統消防安全與熱失控擴散（EEA／挪威）

summary.en: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 sets safety requirements for grid-connected energy storage systems, including evaluation of thermal runaway propagation at cell, module and system level. Ed 2.0 remains in development and does not supersede the 2020 edition for this dataset. Installations must demonstrate that thermal runaway in one cell does not propagate uncontrolled to adjacent cells/modules. Norway is an EEA member and applies CE directives via the EEA Agreement; EN IEC 62933-5-2 is the European adoption applicable in Norway. Norwegian building regulations (TEK17, Byggteknisk forskrift, administered by Direktoratet for byggkvalitet — DiBK) address fire safety for technical installations, and AHJs in Norway increasingly request UL 9540A fire-test data to quantify heat release and propagation risk for fire-compartment design of BESS installations.
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2020为并网储能系统规定了安全要求，包括在电芯、模组和系统层级对热失控扩散进行评估。Ed 2.0仍在制定中，在本数据集中不视为取代2020年版。安装项目须证明单一电芯热失控不会不受控地蔓延至相邻电芯或模组。挪威为EEA成员，通过EEA协议适用CE指令；EN IEC 62933-5-2为适用于挪威的欧洲协调版本。挪威建筑法规（TEK17，Byggteknisk forskrift，由Direktoratet for byggkvalitet即DiBK管理）针对技术设施的防火安全作出规定，挪威各地主管当局日益要求提供UL 9540A火灾试验数据，以量化储能系统安装的释热量与扩散风险，用于防火分区设计。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2020為並網儲能系統規定安全要求，包括在電芯、模組及系統層級對熱失控擴散進行評估。Ed 2.0仍在制定中，在本數據集中不視為取代2020年版。安裝項目須證明單一電芯熱失控不會不受控地蔓延至相鄰電芯或模組。挪威為EEA成員，通過EEA協議適用CE指令；EN IEC 62933-5-2為適用於挪威的歐洲協調版本。挪威建築法規（TEK17，Byggteknisk forskrift，由Direktoratet for byggkvalitet即DiBK管理）針對技術設施的防火安全作出規定，挪威各地主管當局日益要求提供UL 9540A火災試驗數據，以量化儲能系統安裝的釋熱量與擴散風險，用於防火分區設計。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-5-2:2020 — Electrical energy storage (EES) systems – Part 5-2: Safety requirements for grid-integrated EES systems
EN IEC 62933-5-2 (harmonised EEA/EU adoption — harmonised status under review as of 2026-06-11 due to Malamud ruling)
ANSI/CAN/UL 9540A:2025 (5th Edition, published March 12, 2025) — Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems
TEK17 — Byggteknisk forskrift (Norwegian Building Technical Regulations, administered by DiBK — Direktoratet for byggkvalitet)

summary.en: GB/T 36276-2023 (revised, released 6 August 2023 by SAC/SAMR, in force from 1 March 2024, superseding GB/T 36276-2018) covers lithium-ion battery packs and systems for stationary energy storage, including thermal-runaway tests at cell and module level. The 2023 revision tightened test conditions (e.g. external short-circuit resistance reduced from 5 mΩ to 1 mΩ) and expanded abuse-test coverage. However, the propagation-prevention test methodology and pass/fail thresholds differ from IEC 62933-5-2. GB/T 36276 does not adopt UL 9540A protocols, and system-level fire-compartment propagation data generated under Chinese test conditions is generally not in the format required by EEA/Norwegian installers or AHJs.
summary.zh: GB/T 36276-2023（修订版，国家标准化管理委员会/国家市场监督管理总局于2023年8月6日发布，2024年3月1日起实施，取代GB/T 36276-2018）涵盖固定式储能用锂离子电池包及系统，包含电芯和模组层级的热失控试验。2023年修订版收紧了试验条件（如外部短路电阻由5 mΩ降至1 mΩ）并扩展了滥用测试范围。然而，其扩散防止试验方法与合格判定准则与IEC 62933-5-2存在差异。GB/T 36276未采用UL 9540A测试规程，依中国试验条件生成的系统级防火分区扩散数据，通常无法满足EEA/挪威安装商或主管当局所要求的格式。
summary.zht: GB/T 36276-2023（修訂版，國家標準化管理委員會/國家市場監督管理總局於2023年8月6日發布，2024年3月1日起實施，取代GB/T 36276-2018）涵蓋固定式儲能用鋰離子電池包及系統，包含電芯和模組層級的熱失控試驗。2023年修訂版收緊了試驗條件（如外部短路電阻由5 mΩ降至1 mΩ）並擴展了濫用測試範圍。然而，其擴散防止試驗方法與合格判定準則與IEC 62933-5-2存在差異。GB/T 36276未採用UL 9540A測試規程，依中國試驗條件生成的系統級防火分區擴散數據，通常無法滿足EEA/挪威安裝商或主管當局所要求的格式。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — Lithium-ion battery packs and systems for electric energy storage (released 6 August 2023, in force 1 March 2024, supersedes GB/T 36276-2018; recommended national standard)
GB/T 51048-2025 — Standard for Design of Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Station (supersedes GB 51048-2014; issued 31 December 2025, effective 1 April 2026)

gap.en: Key gap: Chinese test reports under GB/T 36276 typically do not include the system-level thermal-runaway propagation test data required by IEC 62933-5-2 Annex C, nor UL 9540A heat-release-rate (HRR) and fire-spread data needed for Norwegian/EEA building and fire-compartment approvals under TEK17. Norwegian AHJs (DiBK, local fire authorities) increasingly request UL 9540A-format data even where not legally mandated, because it feeds fire-compartment sizing calculations. This documentation gap is a frequent barrier at the EEA/Norwegian project-finance and permitting stage.
gap.zh: 主要差距：依GB/T 36276出具的中国测试报告，通常不包含IEC 62933-5-2附录C所要求的系统级热失控扩散试验数据，亦不含TEK17下挪威/EEA建筑及防火分区审批所需的UL 9540A热释放速率（HRR）与火势蔓延数据。即便法律上无强制要求，挪威主管当局（DiBK、地方消防机构）日益普遍地要求提供UL 9540A格式数据，因为该数据用于防火分区尺寸计算。这一文件缺口是EEA/挪威项目融资和许可阶段的常见障碍。
gap.zht: 主要差距：依GB/T 36276出具的中國測試報告，通常不包含IEC 62933-5-2附錄C所要求的系統級熱失控擴散試驗數據，亦不含TEK17下挪威/EEA建築及防火分區審批所需的UL 9540A熱釋放速率（HRR）與火勢蔓延數據。即便法律上無強制要求，挪威主管當局（DiBK、地方消防機構）日益普遍地要求提供UL 9540A格式數據，因為該數據用於防火分區尺寸計算。這一文件缺口是EEA/挪威項目融資和許可階段的常見障礙。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62933-5-2 is referenced in EEA/Norwegian grid-connection and building regulations with varying legal force. EN IEC 62933-5-2 is the European adoption applicable in Norway via the EEA Agreement; its harmonised status under the Low Voltage Directive is not yet confirmed by citation in the EU Official Journal as of mid-2026, partly due to the Malamud ruling; it remains the key technical reference for BESS safety. TEK17 fire requirements are mandatory for building permits in Norway. UL 9540A (5th Edition, March 2025) is not mandated by EEA law but is functionally required by many Norwegian AHJs and insurers.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 36276-2023 is a recommended (推荐性) national standard in China. GB/T 51048-2025 (issued 31 December 2025, effective 1 April 2026) is classified as a recommended (推荐性) national standard. Exact enforcement scope should be verified against current NEA project-approval requirements.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] INFORMATIONAL ONLY — Chinese BESS products certified to GB/T 36276 alone are likely to face documentation gaps when seeking EEA/Norwegian project permits or financing, specifically the absence of IEC 62933-5-2 system-level thermal-runaway propagation test data and UL 9540A fire-spread data. Manufacturers targeting Norway/EEA markets should commission supplementary testing to these standards. This is not legal advice; verify current harmonisation status and applicable Norwegian requirements with a qualified EEA certifier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考——仅依据GB/T 36276认证的中国储能产品，在申请EEA/挪威项目许可或融资时，很可能面临文件缺口，具体表现为缺乏IEC 62933-5-2系统级热失控扩散试验数据及UL 9540A火势蔓延数据。面向挪威/EEA市场的制造商应委托开展上述标准的补充测试。本内容不构成法律意见，请向具备资质的EEA认证机构核实当前协调标准状态及适用的挪威要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考——僅依據GB/T 36276認證的中國儲能產品，在申請EEA/挪威項目許可或融資時，很可能面臨文件缺口，具體表現為缺乏IEC 62933-5-2系統級熱失控擴散試驗數據及UL 9540A火勢蔓延數據。面向挪威/EEA市場的製造商應委託開展上述標準的補充測試。本內容不構成法律意見，請向具備資質的EEA認證機構核實當前協調標準狀態及適用的挪威要求。
